title: Soak Test - Headset disconnected, app in the foreground, phone idle
scenario: Soak test to verify app remains stable and responsive after prolonged idle time with headset disconnected
steps: Install and launch app, pair headset, then turn off headset and go to app Home Screen.
Leave phone idle with app in foreground.
After a few hours, check the app.
expected: Home screen shows headset as disconnected. App remains stable and responsive after prolonged idle time.
